{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323005705CBC90ED8604BFFE131A6"}"},"total":149},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7590043443738149656","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到36章了，目前没什么问题，内容也挺有意思的，强烈推荐！[爱慕]话说是章节太少了吗？感觉不是很火[什么]作者加油✊[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767196987,"group_id":"7572197709956779032","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/W2sePAk4ApaYcDKoOsrnoHnLxMCLeazljOTatSK7eL","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4012558471673248","user_name":"玄天坊的答案"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4012558471673248","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7572197709956779032","book_info":{"abstract":"宫村优羽被大货车送去转生，来到了综漫的世界。
　　凭借穿越者的学识，当文抄公，泡妹子走上人生巅峰......理应如此！
　　但这样是否太无趣了？都当穿越者了，能不能有点志气？
　　“我的名字是宫村优羽，一辈子致力于突破人类基因锁从而达到成神的目的，身上优点无数，至于缺点嘛，就是有点小小的恶趣味......”
　　空银子：“为什么我的青梅竹马天天捉弄我啊！”
　　泽村英梨梨：“我会报复回来的！！.......我开玩笑的，现在投降还有用吗？别整我了呗。”
　　中野二乃：“成神和恶作剧有必要联系吗？什么叫只是排解心情啊？”
　　友利奈绪：“什么叫你想打破基因锁，然后要抽我的血？就算你跪下也没用啊！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8b3329995851928a93e65878349b0be8","author":"若来世","author_id":"","book_id":"7572197709956779032","book_name":"综漫：致力于在日常世界成神的我","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7579310762447880728","read_count":"14850","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"281707"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"124","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,综漫,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/65bda46c5f5af2ccc1eec50755627828~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382625&x-signature=T8JxD8ZfvUyC1qVYXt6fcpaDajQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1829222581801384","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"35"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323005705CBC90ED8604BFFE131A6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwar
